transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, is this Patricia Moore?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, speaking.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Patricia, this is Riley from SafeGuard Insurance. I'm calling regarding your auto and home policy renewal. Before I get into anything, could you confirm your policy number for me?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Sure, it's SG-448821.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect, I have that pulled up. Your renewal is coming up on June 30th. Your premium will be $1,840 for the year, which is a small increase from last year. I want to walk you through what's included.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Sure, go ahead.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Your renewal includes an upgraded roadside assistance package and an increase in your home replacement cost coverage. Given that construction costs have gone up, this is actually an important enhancement.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: That makes sense. And because I've been with you for 5 years, is there any loyalty discount?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely — you qualify for our 5% loyalty discount, which I've already applied. That's reflected in the $1,840 figure. Without it you'd be at $1,935.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Oh good, I didn't realize that was already included. Yes, let's renew.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Wonderful! Your policy is renewed for another year. You'll receive a confirmation email shortly. Thank you for your loyalty, Patricia!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this George Patel?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, this is George.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi George! Riley calling from SafeGuard. I'm reaching out about your policy renewal. Can you confirm your policy number first?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, it's SG-221047.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Got it, thank you. Your policy renews on July 15th. I wanted to go over your coverage and answer any questions before you decide.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I actually had a question — does my policy cover water damage if it's from a pipe that bursts?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great question, George. Yes, sudden and accidental pipe bursts are covered under your current policy. What's not covered is gradual seepage or flooding from external sources, which would require separate flood insurance.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: That's good to know. I've been worried about that. Okay, I'm comfortable renewing.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Excellent! Your premium is $2,110 for the year. You're all set for another year of coverage, George. Confirmation is on its way!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, is this Susan Clark?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Susan, Riley from SafeGuard Insurance. Calling about your policy renewal. Can I confirm your policy number?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Thank you. Your renewal is July 1st. Your premium for this year is $2,340.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: That's up from $2,150 last year. That's quite a jump. Why is it going up so much?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: There have been some rate adjustments across the industry due to inflation in repair costs.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I can probably get a better rate somewhere else. Have you shopped around at all?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I understand the concern. The market rates have gone up across the board.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I'm going to get some quotes before I commit to renewing with you. I'll call back.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course, that's completely your right. We're here if you decide to stay with us.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Thomas Nguyen?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Speaking.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Thomas, Riley from SafeGuard Insurance. Calling about your upcoming renewal. Policy number to confirm?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great. Your renewal comes up June 20th. Premium this year is $1,980.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I've been quoted $1,720 by another company for similar coverage. Can you match that?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can't match a competitor's quote directly. Our pricing reflects the coverage quality we provide.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: What makes your coverage worth $260 more?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: We have a strong claims track record and local adjusters. It's hard to put an exact number on that.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I think I'm going to go with the competitor. I'll let you know if I change my mind.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, is this Jennifer Mills?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, hi!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Jennifer! Riley from SafeGuard. I'm calling about your auto policy renewal. Policy number to confirm?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: SG-882301. And by the way, we actually just got married last month so I need to update my name on file.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Congratulations! I'll make a note to update your name. Your renewal is July 5th. The premium is $1,430 for the year.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Sounds reasonable. Yes, go ahead and renew.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Wonderful! All renewed. I'll also send you the name change form. Congratulations again on the marriage!

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Thank you! He's getting his own car insurance sorted out too actually.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Great — just let him know we're always here if he needs coverage. Have a wonderful day, Jennifer!

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Mark Davis?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Mark, Riley from SafeGuard Insurance. Your policy is up for renewal on June 25th. This year's premium is $1,670. Are you comfortable renewing?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: What policy is this? I have a few with you.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: It's your home policy.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Okay, yeah. What's the policy number on this one?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Let me pull that up — it's SG-443721.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Okay, that sounds right. Sure, renew it.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Done! Your home policy is renewed. Confirmation on its way, Mark.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good afternoon, is this Alice Ford?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, but this isn't a good time.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I'll be quick — this is Riley from SafeGuard about your policy renewal—

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Call me back another time. Goodbye.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, is this Steven Walsh?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yeah, what do you want?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Steven, Riley from SafeGuard Insurance, calling about your upcoming renewal.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: My premium went up $400 this year and nobody bothered to tell me until I got the renewal notice. That's ridiculous.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I completely understand your frustration, Steven. You're right that increase should have been communicated earlier. I'm sorry about that.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Sorry doesn't change the fact that I'm paying $400 more. What are you going to do about it?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can apply your loyalty discount — you've been with us 4 years — which would reduce it by about $120. I understand that doesn't cover the full difference, but it's what I'm able to offer.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I've already gotten quotes from two other companies that are $300 cheaper even with your discount. Why would I stay?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: That's a fair question, Steven. I genuinely can't guarantee we can match that gap. If you decide to switch, I understand.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: I'll be switching. This call has been a waste of my time.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi, is this Barbara Young?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, hi.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Barbara! Riley from SafeGuard. Calling about your home policy renewal. Can I confirm your policy number?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: SG-667012. Though I actually wanted to ask — we filed a claim in February and it still hasn't been fully resolved. Is that going to affect my renewal?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I want to help with that, but a pending claim is something our claims department handles directly. I don't want to give you incorrect information on how it affects your renewal.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: So you can't tell me anything about my own claim?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: I can see there's an open claim on your file, but the details and status need to come from our claims team who have the full case. I'd feel better connecting you with them directly so you get accurate answers.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Okay. Can you transfer me?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Absolutely. Let me connect you right now. They'll be able to give you a full update and also address any renewal concerns tied to the claim.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Good morning, is this Charles Bennett?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Yes, hi.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Hi Charles! Riley from SafeGuard. I'm calling about your auto and home bundle renewal. Can I start by confirming your policy number?

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Sure — SG-112884.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Perfect, I have your account up. Your bundle renewal is July 10th. This year's combined premium is $3,210 — that already includes your 5% loyalty discount as a 6-year customer.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: That's fair. I have a few questions about what changed in the coverage.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Of course, ask away.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Does the auto policy still cover a rental car if mine's in the shop after an accident?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes it does — rental reimbursement is included up to $50 per day for up to 30 days. That's unchanged from last year.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Good. And the home coverage — is the deductible still $1,000?

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Yes, $1,000 deductible is unchanged. You're actually at a very competitive coverage level for your premium.

transcript.speaker: human
transcript.text: Alright, sounds good. Let's renew for another year.

transcript.speaker: agent
transcript.text: Excellent Charles! You're all renewed. Confirmation email is coming shortly. Thank you for 6 years with SafeGuard!
